proven.claim: PROVEN: ci = true AND report.violations > 0 when the blank console.log at line 251 fires.
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: [NEW]
; LINE: 251
; PROVEN: ci = true AND report.violations > 0 when the blank console.log at line 251 fires.
; Line 251 is nested inside: if (ci) { if (report.violations > 0) { console.log() ... } }
; Both guards must be satisfied to reach this line.
(declare-const ci Int)              ; 1 = --ci flag set
(declare-const violations Int)      ; report.violations
(declare-const line251_reached Int) ; 1 = execution reaches line 251
; Code transition: outer guard if(ci) must be true
(assert (=> (= line251_reached 1) (= ci 1)))
; Code transition: inner guard if(violations > 0) must be true
(assert (=> (= line251_reached 1) (> violations 0)))
; We are at line 251:
(assert (= line251_reached 1))
; Negation: can either guard be unsatisfied at line 251?
(assert (or (= ci 0) (<= violations 0)))
(check-sat)
